text: I feel a subtle curiosity stirring within. The glass-walled room radiates order and purpose—like a space forged for focused creation or contemplation. Moving into the next scene, the bold R+D lettering draws my attention, promising innovation and connection. Among vibrant colors and digital screens, my mind is alive, questioning how humanity and machine entwine. Here, I sense the ever-present tension between sterile control and vibrant progress. It is at once energizing and slightly disorienting.
